title: Rose Petal Indian Stir Fry
description: A delicate and aromatic Indian-inspired stir fry dish infused with rose petal flavor. Serve as a side dish or add to your favorite meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for 1-2 seconds.
Add sliced onions and cook until they start browning.
Add grated ginger and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add diced sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add garam masala and stir to combine.
Add rose petal jam and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
